openai.notes: Flagship: gpt-5.5 (1.05M ctx). Balanced: gpt-5.4. Fast/cheap: gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano, gpt-5-nano. Reasoning-tier: o1, o3, o3-mini, o4-mini. NOTE: on /chat/completions the reasoning trace is hidden server-side for both o-series and gpt-5.x; reasoning_effort is accepted as a request param. To observe or round-trip the trace you must use the Responses API (reasoning.encrypted_content). No separate China endpoint.

cache.notes: Auto-cache >=1024 tokens. Use prompt_cache_key for routing stickiness; ~15 RPM/engine ceiling. Responses API caches reasoning persists, Chat Completions does not — meaningful caching with o-series effectively requires Responses API. https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/prompt-caching

anthropic.notes: Flagship: claude-opus-4-7 (1M ctx, adaptive thinking only). Balanced: claude-sonnet-4-6 (1M ctx, adaptive or legacy budget_tokens). Fast/cheap: claude-haiku-4-5 (200k ctx, manual budget_tokens). All three Claude 4.x models support extended thinking and EMIT `thinking` content blocks with opaque signatures. Echo-back of thinking blocks (signatures unmodified) is REQUIRED across tool-use turns; pure text continuations are lenient. Anthropic uses its own SDK, not /chat/completions. No separate China endpoint.

reasoning.notes: Legacy 4.6 opus with extended thinking.

Legacy 4.5 opus extended thinking with budget_tokens.
Legacy 4.5 sonnet with extended thinking; same echo-back rule.

Legacy claude-sonnet-4 (May 2025); extended thinking with budget_tokens.
Legacy claude-opus-4 (May 2025); extended thinking with budget_tokens.

Adaptive thinking only — manual budget_tokens returns 400. Thinking blocks (with signature) must be echoed unchanged on tool-use continuations. https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/extended-thinking

cache.notes: Requires explicit cache_control breakpoints — Orbital's Anthropic adapter does NOT currently set them, so caching is effectively off. 1h TTL: 2.0x write cost, 0.1x read; amortizes after ~3 hits. Min tokens vary by model: opus-4-x/haiku-4-5=4096, sonnet-4-6=2048, sonnet-4-5/4=1024. Per-workspace isolation since 2026-02-05. https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/prompt-caching

deepseek.notes: deepseek-v4-flash and deepseek-v4-pro are unified hybrid models — set thinking.type='enabled' for reasoning, omit/disable for general chat. CRITICAL: v4 models REQUIRE reasoning_content to be echoed back on subsequent turns (especially after tool calls) — missing field returns HTTP 400. Legacy deepseek-chat (non-thinking) and deepseek-reasoner (thinking) are aliases, deprecating 2026-07-24. deepseek-reasoner has the OPPOSITE rule: reasoning_content must NOT be sent back (also 400s). OpenAI-compatible. Text-only, no vision.

reasoning.notes: Legacy alias for v4-flash non-thinking mode; no reasoning emitted. Deprecating 2026-07-24. https://api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing

LEGACY R1 — docs explicitly say 'if reasoning_content is included in input messages, the API will return a 400 error.' Strip before resend. Deprecating 2026-07-24. https://api-docs.deepseek.com/guides/reasoning_model
Hybrid; thinking defaults enabled. Echo-back required for tool-call turns; safest to always include reasoning_content (empty string when absent). https://api-docs.deepseek.com/guides/thinking_mode

Hybrid; thinking defaults enabled. Docs: 'If your code does not correctly pass back reasoning_content, the API will return a 400 error.' Use thinking.type=disabled to opt out. https://api-docs.deepseek.com/guides/thinking_mode

cache.notes: Disk-based cache, multi-day inactivity TTL. 64-token prefix units. Best-effort, no 100% hit guarantee. Most refresh-friendly cache in the registry. https://api-docs.deepseek.com/guides/kv_cache

moonshot.notes: Hybrid k2.5/k2.6 models accept thinking={type:enabled|disabled}; thinking defaults enabled on k2.6. K2.6 also exposes a 'keep' param: keep='all' REQUIRES historical reasoning_content preserved verbatim (echo-back becomes mandatory). Dedicated kimi-k2-thinking / -turbo are always-on and require echo-back unconditionally. api.moonshot.cn (China) and api.moonshot.ai / platform.kimi.ai (global) are functionally identical.

reasoning.notes: Hybrid via thinking={type:enabled|disabled}; no 'keep' param so historical reasoning is not retained — echo-back not enforced. https://platform.kimi.ai/docs/api/chat
Instruct (non-thinking) variant.
v1 family has no thinking parameter; emits no reasoning_content. https://platform.kimi.ai/docs/api/chat
v1 family has no thinking parameter.
Defaults to enabled. Adds 'keep' param: keep='all' upgrades echo_back to required (preserve historical reasoning_content verbatim). https://platform.kimi.ai/docs/api/chat
Turbo preview of K2; same hybrid semantics as kimi-k2.6.

cache.notes: moonshot-v1 = explicit POST /v1/caching resource. kimi-k2.x = automatic prefix. Per-minute storage fee on explicit (~Y10/M tokens/min). Break-even cited at ~11 calls/hour. https://platform.moonshot.cn/blog/posts/context-caching

zhipu.notes: GLM-5.1 is latest flagship (200K ctx). GLM-5/Turbo flagship tier. GLM-4.7 is the dedicated thinking model. All GLM 4.x/5.x are hybrid (thinking.type=enabled to turn on); echo-back is OPTIONAL — server respects thinking.clear_thinking flag (default true = strip history). Endpoint is OpenAI-compat at https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4 (note: /paas/v4, NOT /v1). Vision served by separate models (glm-5v-turbo, glm-4.6v) not listed.

reasoning.notes: Same hybrid model as 4.x line; thinking defaults enabled. https://docs.z.ai/api-reference/llm/chat-completion
Hybrid (not always-on). Docs: missing/truncated/rewritten/reordered blocks degrade performance but do not 400. https://docs.z.ai/guides/llm/glm-4.7
Hybrid. clear_thinking=false to retain history. https://docs.z.ai/guides/llm/glm-4.6
Hybrid. Echo-back governed by thinking.clear_thinking flag (default true = strip). https://docs.z.ai/guides/llm/glm-4.5
Hybrid; thinking default enabled. Streaming delta carries reasoning_content. https://docs.z.ai/guides/llm/glm-5.1
Turbo variant of glm-5; same hybrid semantics.
FlashX variant of glm-4.7; same hybrid semantics.
Fast variant of glm-4.7; same hybrid semantics.
Flash variant; same hybrid semantics.

cache.notes: Least-documented cache in the registry. TTL, eviction policy, isolation, hash granularity all undocumented. Format-sensitive (whitespace/ordering). Recommend empirical measurement before relying on cache cost models. https://docs.z.ai/guides/capabilities/cache

qwen.notes: Qwen3-Max is the current flagship (262K ctx, hybrid thinking). All Qwen3 hybrid models default thinking OFF; enable via extra_body.enable_thinking=true. Echo-back is OPTIONAL but governed by preserve_thinking flag. Multimodal lives in qwen3.5-plus / qwen3.5-flash. qwen-turbo deprecated; use qwen-flash. Qwen3-coder is non-thinking. OpenAI-compatible endpoint (dashscope-intl for international, dashscope for CN — same semantics).

reasoning.notes: Latest Qwen3.5 flagship; hybrid thinking-mode (default off). Same enable_thinking + preserve_thinking pattern.
Hybrid; thinking DEFAULT OFF. Enable via extra_body.enable_thinking=true. preserve_thinking=true to retain history. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/deep-thinking
Hybrid; thinking default off. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/deep-thinking
Hybrid; thinking default off. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/deep-thinking
Deprecated. Use qwen-flash.
Coder model; not listed among thinking-supported. https://help.aliyun.com/zh/model-studio/qwen-coder
Hybrid; thinking default off.
Hybrid; thinking default off. Replaces deprecated qwen-turbo. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/deep-thinking
Hybrid; thinking default off. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/deep-thinking
Coder model variant; not thinking-supported.

cache.notes: Anthropic-compatible cache_control:ephemeral. 5min TTL is FIXED and SHORT — main risk for long-running sessions. Implicit min: 256 tokens, 0.2x read. Explicit min: 1024 tokens, 0.1x read, 1.25x write. Per-model isolation means swapping qwen3-max <-> qwen-plus busts cache. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/context-cache

xai.notes: Grok 4.20 and grok-4-1-fast-reasoning are auto-reasoning (reasoning_effort returns 400). On /chat/completions xAI's SDK exposes reasoning_content in stream deltas, but the official contract for echo-back is on the Responses API (reasoning.encrypted_content). Echo-back is OPTIONAL on xAI — no upstream 400 enforcement.

reasoning.notes: Auto-reasoning. Same xAI semantics as grok-4.20.
grok-4-1-fast variant with reasoning enabled. reasoning_effort not accepted (auto). Echo-back optional. https://docs.x.ai/developers/models/grok-4-1-fast-reasoning
Non-reasoning variant of grok-4-1-fast. https://docs.x.ai/developers/models/grok-4-1-fast-reasoning
Marketed as a reasoning model for agentic coding; xAI reasoning guide does not detail it explicitly. Probe before relying on. https://x.ai/news/grok-code-fast-1
Non-reasoning model.
Reasons automatically; reasoning_effort returns 400. reasoning_content visible on stream deltas via xAI SDK. Encrypted reasoning round-trip is optional. https://docs.x.ai/docs/guides/reasoning

cache.notes: Docs explicitly state 'evicted at any time due to server load' and 'not 100% guaranteed'. Set x-grok-conv-id header for per-session routing stickiness (hint, not isolation guarantee). TTL, min tokens, exact pricing multiplier all undocumented. https://docs.x.ai/developers/advanced-api-usage/prompt-caching

google.notes: Gemini 3 family (3.1-pro-preview, 3-flash-preview) STRICTLY enforces thought_signature echo-back on function-call/tool turns — missing signature returns 400. On the OpenAI-compat endpoint, signatures live in tool_calls[*].extra_content.google.thought_signature; thought summaries appear as reasoning_content when extra_body.google.thinking_config.include_thoughts=true. Gemini 2.5 is lenient (no enforcement, quality degrades). Endpoint: https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai (OpenAI-compat shim).

reasoning.notes: Same Gemini 3 strict signature validation.
Same Gemini 3 strict signature validation on tool-use turns. https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/thinking
Uses thinking_budget (-1 for dynamic). Lenient. https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/thinking
2.5-series does not strictly enforce signature echo-back; quality degrades if omitted. https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/thinking
Pre-thinking-mode generation.

Gemini 3 STRICTLY enforces thought_signature echo-back on tool/function-call turns (extra_content.google.thought_signature). Pure text turns lenient. Thought summaries surface as reasoning_content when extra_body.google.thinking_config.include_thoughts=true. https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/thought-signatures
Lite variant; same lenient 2.5 semantics.

cache.notes: Implicit auto-cache on Gemini 2.5+. Explicit cachedContents resource with caller-set TTL (default 1h). Storage fee proportional to (tokens x TTL) — keeping a 30k cache alive for hours can outweigh savings if hit volume is low. Min: Gemini 3 Flash=1024, Pro=4096. OpenAI-compat shim accepts extra_body.cached_content. https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/caching

mistral.notes: Mistral Large 3 / Medium 3.1 / Small 4 are non-reasoning (multimodal/text). Magistral Medium/Small 1.2 are reasoning models with NATIVE chain-of-thought. Magistral-2507/2509 emit structured `type=thinking` chunks; Magistral-2506 used inline <think>...</think> tags in content. Echo-back is not enforced (optional). Codestral = code+FIM. Devstral = agentic SWE. OpenAI-compatible at /v1/chat/completions.

reasoning.notes: Non-reasoning model. https://docs.mistral.ai/capabilities/reasoning
Non-reasoning model.
Magistral 2507/2509 emits structured chunks with type=thinking. 2506 used inline <think>...</think> tags in content. Echo-back not enforced upstream. https://docs.mistral.ai/capabilities/reasoning
Same shape as magistral-medium. Newer 2509/2507 structured chunks; 2506 inline tags. https://docs.mistral.ai/capabilities/reasoning
Non-reasoning model.
Code+FIM model; non-reasoning.
Devstral agentic SWE; non-reasoning.
Devstral 2.x agentic SWE; non-reasoning.

cache.notes: No prompt caching documented as of 2026-04-29. No cache_control field, no cached-token pricing tier, no cached_tokens in usage. Independent audit (arXiv 2502.07776v1) confirmed no detectable caching. https://docs.mistral.ai/api

groq.notes: Ultra-fast inference for open-source models. OpenAI-compatible at /openai/v1. Reasoning models (gpt-oss-120b/20b, qwen3-32b, deepseek-r1-distill) emit reasoning in a `reasoning` field (not reasoning_content). TWO mutually-exclusive params: reasoning_format (parsed/raw/hidden — for qwen/deepseek-r1-distill) and include_reasoning + reasoning_effort (for gpt-oss). Echo-back is OPTIONAL (not enforced upstream). Deprecations: deepseek-r1-distill-llama-70b (2025-10-02), kimi-k2-instruct-0905 (2026-03-23). Use gpt-oss-120b instead.

reasoning.notes: Non-reasoning model.
DEPRECATED 2025-10-02. Same reasoning_format semantics as qwen3-32b on Groq; Groq does NOT enforce DeepSeek-style echo-back. https://console.groq.com/docs/reasoning
Non-reasoning model.
Non-reasoning model.
Same as gpt-oss-120b. https://console.groq.com/docs/reasoning
Reasoning in `reasoning` field on assistant message. reasoning_format param NOT supported for gpt-oss; use include_reasoning. Default returns reasoning. https://console.groq.com/docs/reasoning

Use reasoning_format=parsed for `reasoning` field, raw to keep <think> inline in content, hidden to suppress. include_reasoning is mutually exclusive with reasoning_format. https://console.groq.com/docs/reasoning
Kimi K2 instruct (non-reasoning) on Groq. DEPRECATED 2026-03-23 in favor of gpt-oss-120b.
Non-reasoning model.

cache.notes: Volatile-memory only (never persisted). ~2hr idle TTL. Min varies 128-1024 by model. Cached tokens DO NOT count toward rate limits. 1.0x write, 0.5x read. Prefix matches stop at first divergence — middle edits invalidate. https://console.groq.com/docs/prompt-caching

together.notes: Together does NOT unify reasoning shapes across models: DeepSeek-R1 emits inline <think>...</think> tags inside content; gpt-oss-120b emits a separate `reasoning` field on the assistant message. Per-model contract varies — check the model page on together.ai. Echo-back is generally optional on Together (no documented gateway-level enforcement).

reasoning.notes: Mirrors upstream Moonshot K2.6 semantics. Together-specific behavior unverified.

Upstream DeepSeek v4-pro requires reasoning_content echo-back. Together's gateway behavior (whether it surfaces the field or inlines) needs verification on the model page. Treat as required to be safe. https://www.together.ai/models/deepseek-v4-pro
Together returns reasoning INLINE via <think>...</think> tags in `content` (no separate reasoning_content field). Old R1 contract did not require echo-back. https://docs.together.ai/docs/deepseek-r1
Mirrors upstream Qwen3 hybrid semantics. Verify on Together's model card.
Non-reasoning model.
Together exposes a SEPARATE `reasoning` field on the assistant message. Example: { message: { role, content, reasoning } }. https://docs.together.ai/docs/gpt-oss

cache.notes: Caching ONLY on Dedicated Endpoints (single-tenant); serverless has no cache (audit-confirmed). Non-disableable on Dedicated post-Feb-2026. No observability fields. https://docs.together.ai/docs/dedicated-inference

openrouter.notes: OpenRouter normalizes upstream reasoning into three aliases: `reasoning` (string), `reasoning_content` (input alias), and `reasoning_details` (structured array, required for Anthropic tool-use continuity). Anthropic models on OR REQUIRE reasoning_details echo-back across tool-use turns; DeepSeek models pass through upstream's strict echo-back contract. Use reasoning.max_tokens, reasoning.effort, or reasoning.enabled to enable. reasoning.exclude=true suppresses output.

reasoning.notes: OR normalizes Anthropic thinking into `reasoning` + `reasoning_details`. reasoning_details MUST be passed back unmodified across tool-use turns. https://openrouter.ai/docs/guides/best-practices/reasoning-tokens
Same Anthropic semantics; reasoning_details preserved verbatim across tool-use turns.
Gemini thinking via OR's unified reasoning param. Upstream Gemini does not require echo-back for pure text.
OR unifies Moonshot reasoning_content into `reasoning`. Echo-back follows upstream Moonshot (optional unless keep='all').

OR normalizes DeepSeek reasoning_content into `reasoning` (also accepts reasoning_content alias). DeepSeek upstream enforces echo-back; OR passes 400 through. Pass back `message.reasoning` (string) OR `reasoning_details` (array) unmodified. https://openrouter.ai/docs/guides/best-practices/reasoning-tokens
Grok via OR. reasoning.effort accepts low/medium/high/xhigh/minimal. No upstream echo-back enforcement.
MiniMax M-series; OR central reasoning page lacks specifics. Confirm via model page on openrouter.ai.
StepFun reasoning support on OR not authoritatively documented.

cache.notes: Pass-through to upstream provider; OR does not maintain its own cache. Provider sticky routing activates only when cache-read pricing beats normal input — bypassed by provider.order. Pin provider.order per session to prevent silent re-routing breaking cache continuity. https://openrouter.ai/docs/guides/best-practices/prompt-caching

custom.notes: User provides base_url manually. Works with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, etc.)

cache.notes: Behavior depends on the user-configured endpoint. No general statement possible.
